jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Myntra
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Myntra. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Kochi-based team.

About Myntra:
Myntra is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Myntra!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
